title: Discover Your Spark
prompts: [{"question":"What activities make you lose track of time?","type":"open"},{"question":"When do you feel most alive?","type":"open"},{"question":"What would you do even without getting paid?","type":"open"}]

title: Problem Solver Quest
prompts: [{"question":"Describe a recent problem you solved creatively","type":"open"},{"options":["Alone","With others","Depends on the problem"],"question":"Do you prefer working alone or with others on problems?","type":"choice"},{"options":["Technical","People","Creative","Analytical","Physical"],"question":"What type of problems excite you most?","type":"multi"}]

title: Visual Vibes
prompts: [{"question":"Select images that resonate with you","type":"visual_select"},{"question":"What colors energize you?","type":"color_picker"},{"question":"Choose your ideal work environment","type":"visual_select"}]

title: Values Compass
description: Understand what matters most to you
prompts: [{"question":"What makes work meaningful to you?","type":"open"},{"options":["Impact","Creativity","Stability","Growth","Recognition","Independence"],"question":"Rank these values","type":"ranking"},{"question":"Describe your ideal work-life balance","type":"open"}]

title: Skills Safari
prompts: [{"question":"What do people often ask for your help with?","type":"open"},{"options":["Public speaking","Writing","Analysis","Design","Organizing","Teaching"],"question":"Rate your comfort with these activities","type":"scale"},{"options":["Leadership","Technical","Creative","Communication","Strategic"],"question":"Which skills do you want to develop?","type":"multi"}]
